overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, reflective wet surfaces, and dense urban architecture. The player character moves through commercial districts, enters a brightly lit underpass, and continues along a waterfront promenade. The footage exhibits high-fidelity game engine rendering with ray-traced reflections and atmospheric fog typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a futuristic city, with the player walking past a blue neon food truck. The wet asphalt reflects the surrounding neon lights. Pedestrians walk alongside as the camera approaches a large building with prominent red signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with vibrant pink neon lighting

enters area dominated by magenta pink neon illumination
lighting transitions from pink to bright cyan as approaching the covered corridor

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking into a covered underpass area with vibrant neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The player turns right toward an underpass entrance bathed in pink neon light. The environment becomes more enclosed as they approach the covered walkway, passing palm tree planters and metal railings. The lighting shifts dramatically from ambient street lighting to vibrant magenta and then cyan.

events.description: approaching the end of the corridor, bright light visible at the exit

segments.scene_description: The player enters a futuristic corridor with intense cyan lighting that creates a high-key, almost overexposed atmosphere. Digital advertisements line the walls as the player follows a pedestrian toward the distant exit. The space is enclosed with concrete pillars and tiled flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with digital billboards and corporate buildings

events.description: exits the covered corridor back to the outdoor night environment with green neon lighting
slight left turn along the waterfront promenade approaching the large office complex

agents.ego_description: walking along a waterfront promenade past digital billboards toward a large illuminated office complex

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens along the street showing various products
3D holographic advertisement enclosed in a glowing green wireframe cube
massive multi-story curved building with numerous lit windows and modern architecture
metal safety railing along the edge of the waterfront promenade

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bright corridor, the player returns to the dark night street now along a waterfront promenade. Large digital billboards and a distinctive holographic cube advertisement line the path. The camera moves toward a massive curved office building in the distance, with the waterfront railing visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy cyberpunk city that transitions from open neon streets into a sterile, high-intensity corridor before emerging onto a waterfront promenade. It begins on wet asphalt reflecting blue neon from a food truck, moving past pedestrians toward a building with prominent red signage. As the camera turns right, the environment becomes more enclosed, shifting from ambient street lighting to vibrant magenta tones while passing palm tree planters and metal railings. The scene then enters a futuristic corridor of intense, overexposed cyan light and digital advertisements, following a pedestrian through a space of concrete pillars and tiled flooring. Finally, the camera exits the bright tunnel back into the dark night, gliding along a waterfront railing past a holographic cube advertisement toward a massive curved office building in the distance.
